nasb.text: They are coming from a far country, From the farthest horizons, The Lord and His instruments of indignation, To destroy the whole land.

esv.text: They come from a distant land, from the end of the heavens, the Lord and the weapons of his indignation, to destroy the whole land.

cnv.text: 他們從遠地而來， 從天邊而來。 就是耶和華和他惱怒的工具， 要毀滅這全地。

ccb.text: 他们从地极，从天边而来。 那是耶和华及倾倒祂烈怒的兵器， 要来毁灭大地。

csbs.text: 他们从遥远之地、从天边而来—— 耶和华和他愤怒的器皿正来毁灭全地。
